blocks.title: Repo + workflow status reads over serve
Kanban board: rows instead of columns

tasks.title: Swap Kanban layout direction to rows
tasks.description: Change the Kanban board's columns Layout from Direction::Horizontal to Direction::Vertical in src/overview/mod.rs, keeping the existing 33/33/34 constraints as row heights.
acceptance_criteria: The In Progress / Up Next / Blocked lanes render as three stacked horizontal rows, not side-by-side columns.
No other rendering logic in src/overview/mod.rs changed.
Manual tmux capture-pane smoke test result recorded in Notes.

tasks.title: Validate
tasks.description: Run the project's gating checks and confirm all pass.
acceptance_criteria: fmt, clippy, test, and release build all pass.

blocks.title: Mission Control: apply the console theme

tasks.title: Theme status_color() and error/banner spans
tasks.description: Replace hardcoded Color::Yellow/Green/Red/DarkGray in src/monitor/ui.rs's status_color() and error/banner spans with ui_theme::cyan()/sage()/rose()/muted().
acceptance_criteria: status_color() has a unit test asserting each RunStatus variant maps to the expected ui_theme color.
No Color::Yellow/Green/Red/DarkGray literals remain in src/monitor/ui.rs.

tasks.title: Theme Mission Control borders
tasks.description: Update graph pane and detail pane borders to use ui_theme::border_dim_style()/border_active_style(), matching Kanban's border treatment.
acceptance_criteria: Mission Control's borders use the same border_dim_style()/border_active_style() treatment as Kanban.
Manual tmux capture-pane smoke test result recorded in Notes.

tasks.title: Validate
tasks.description: Run the project's gating checks and confirm all pass.
acceptance_criteria: fmt, clippy, test, and release build all pass.

tasks.title: MissionItem enum + pure merge/ordering function
tasks.description: Add a MissionItem enum (Session/Run) and a pure build_mission_items(sessions, runs) -> Vec<MissionItem> function to src/monitor/app.rs, replacing separate selected_run/selected_node indices with a single selected index.
acceptance_criteria: build_mission_items() has unit tests covering empty, sessions-only, runs-only, and mixed-ordering cases.

tasks.title: Unified list + detail-pane rendering
tasks.description: Update render_graph_pane and render_detail_pane in src/monitor/ui.rs to render the merged MissionItem list and branch detail rendering per variant.
acceptance_criteria: Selecting a session shows session detail (name, agent state, foreground command, last output line) in the right pane.
Selecting a run shows the existing run/node detail.
Manual tmux capture-pane smoke test result recorded in Notes.

tasks.title: Wire sessions into Mission Control + keep keybindings working
tasks.description: Feed AppState.sessions into monitor_app.items via build_mission_items() each poll tick, and route attach/new/send/kill keybindings through the selected MissionItem::Session.
acceptance_criteria: a/n/s/k keybindings work correctly when a session item is selected in Mission Control.

tasks.title: Validate
tasks.description: Run the project's gating checks and confirm all pass.
acceptance_criteria: fmt, clippy, test, and release build all pass.
